duas.title: Ziyarat Imam Hussain (as) - 15 Rajab / Shaban
duas.description:
Specific for Rajab 1st/15th(Day/Night) and 15th Sha'ban )
Shaykh al-Mufid and Sayyid Ibn Tawus,mention the following form of ziyarah is dedicated to the 1st 'day' of Rajab and 15th Shaban night. al-Shahid added that it is also dedicated to the 1st night ,15th Night and 15th Day of Rajab, and 15th Day of Sha'ban. In conclusion, this form of ziyarah is dedicated to six times.
Shaykh al-Mufid and Sayyid Ibn Tawus,mention the following form of ziyarah is dedicated to the first day of Rajab and the fifteenth night of Sha`ban. However, al-Shahid added that it is also dedicated to the first night of Rajab, the fifteenth night of it, the fifteenth day of it, and the fifteenth day of Sha`ban. In conclusion, this form of ziyarah is dedicated to six times.
Upon entering the shrine, stop at the holy tomb, and repeat one hundred times:
اللَّهُ اكْبَرُ

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the seal of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Messengers.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُسَيْنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O al-Husayn the son of `Ali.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna fatimata sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O saint of Allah and son of His saint.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ صَفِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safiyya allahi wabna safiyyihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O select of Allah and son of His select.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حُجَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wabna hujjatihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah and son of His argument.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَبِيبَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حَبِيبِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya habiba allahi wabna habibihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah and son of the beloved by Him.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَفِيرَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ سَفِيرِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safira allahi wabna safirihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O representative of Allah and son of His representative.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ ٱلكِتَابِ ٱلْمَسْطُورِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O keeper of the inscribed Scripture.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلتَّوْرَاةِ وَٱلإِنْجِيلِ وَٱلزَّبُورِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha alttawrati wal-injili walzzaburi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Torah, the Gospel, and the Psalms.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O trustee of the All-beneficent God.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا شَرِيكَ ٱلقُرْآنِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O partner of the Qur'an.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَمُودَ ٱلدِّينِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O support of the religion.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِكْمَةِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hikmati rabbi al`alamina
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O door to the wisdom of the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ حِطَّةٍ ٱلَّذِي مَنْ دَخَلَهُ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلآمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba hittatin alladhi man dakhalahu kana min al-aminina
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O door of Forgiveness; he who enters from this door will be of the secured ones.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْبَةَ عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O case of Allah’s knowledge.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْضِعَ سِرِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O place of Allah’s secret.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O (the object of) Allah’s vengeance and the violated sanctity.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ وَأَنَاخَتْ بِرَحْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa `ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika wa anakhat birahlika
segments.translation: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your yard and settled down near your caravan.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi
segments.translation: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and myself as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: لَقَدْ عَظُمَتِ ٱلْمُصِيبَةُ وَجَلَّتِ ٱلرَّزِيَّةُ بِكَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: laqad `azumat almusibatu wa jallat alrraziyyatu bika `alayna wa `ala jami`i ahli al-islami
segments.translation: O Abu-`Abdullah, unbearable is the sorrow and never-racking is the agony you put up with, for us and for all (true) Muslims.

segments.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ البَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: fala`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri `alaykum ahla albayti
segments.translation: Curse of Allah be on the people who laid the basis of wronging and injustice against you the Household of the Prophet.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan dafa`atkum `an maqamikum
segments.translation: Curse of Allah be upon the people who removed you from your position

segments.arabic: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa azalatkum `an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha
segments.translation: and took you away from your actual ranks that Allah has chosen for you.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي وَنَفْسِي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi ya aba `abdillahi
segments.translation: May Allah accept my father, my mother, and me as ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدِ ٱقْشَعَرَّتْ لِدِمَائِكُمْ أَظِلَّةُ ٱلعَرْشِ مَعَ أَظِلَّةِ ٱلْخَلائِقِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad iqsha`arrat lidima'ikum azillatu al`arshi ma`a azillati alkhala'iqi
segments.translation: I bear witness that the shades of the Divine Throne shared the shades of the creatures in shuddering for the shedding of your blood.

segments.arabic: وَبَكَتْكُمُ ٱلسَّمَاءُ وَٱلأَرْضُ وَسُكَّانُ ٱلْجِنَانِ وَٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa bakatkum alssama'u wal-ardu wa sukkanu aljinani walbarri walbahri
segments.translation: The heavens, the earth, and the inhabitants of the gardens of Paradise, the lands, and the oceans—all those wept for you.

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَدَدَ مَا فِي عِلْمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: May Allah shower upon you blessings as many as the number of what is there in the knowledge of Allah.

segments.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Here I am at your service, O caller to Allah.

segments.arabic: إِنْ كَانَ لَمْ يُجِبْكَ بَدَنِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِغَاثَتِكَ وَلِسَانِي عِنْدَ ٱسْتِنْصَارِكَ
segments.transliteration: in kana lam yujibka badani `inda istighathatika wa lisani `inda istinsarika
segments.translation: If my body could not respond to your call when you called for aid and my tongue could not respond to your call for help,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ أَجَابَكَ قَلْبِي وَسَمْعِي وَبَصَرِي
segments.transliteration: faqad ajabaka qalbi wa sam`i wa basari
segments.translation: then my heart, my hearing, and my sight have verily responded to you.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا إِنْ كَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّنَا لَمَفْعُولاً
segments.transliteration: subhana rabbina in kana wa`du rabbina lamaf`ulan
segments.translation: Glory be to our Lord! Most surely, the promise of our Lord was to be fulfilled.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ طُهْرٌ طَاهِرٌ مُطَهَّرٌ مِنْ طُهْرٍ طَاهِرٍ مُطَهَّرٍ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka tuhrun tahirun mutahharun min tuhrin tahirin mutahharin
segments.translation: I bear witness that you are pure, immaculate, and purified and you are the offspring of the pure, immaculate, and purified ones.

segments.arabic: طَهُرْتَ وَطَهُرَتْ بِكَ ٱلْبِلاَدُ
segments.translation: You are indeed pure and you are the reason for the purity of the lands.

segments.arabic: وَطَهُرَتْ أَرْضٌ أَنْتَ بِهَا وَطَهُرَ حَرَمُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tahurat ardun anta biha wa tahura haramuka
segments.translation: Pure is the land where you are and pure is your holy shrine.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ أَمَرْتَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَٱلْعَدْلِ وَدَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِمَا
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad amarta bilqisti wal`adli wa da`awta ilayhima
segments.translation: I bear witness that you enjoined justice and fairness and you called to them.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ صَادِقٌ صِدِّيقٌ صَدَقْتَ فِيمَا دَعَوْتَ إِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka sadiqun siddiqun sadaqta fima da`awta ilayhi
segments.translation: And you are verily honest and veracious, and you were truthful in that for which you called.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ ثَارُ ٱللَّهِ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka tharu allahi fi al-ardi
segments.translation: And you are verily (the object of) Allah’s vengeance on the earth.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ عَنِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka qad ballaghta `an allahi
segments.translation: And I bear witness that you did convey on behalf of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ جَدِّكَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: on behalf of your grandfather the Messenger of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ أَبِيكَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: on behalf of your father the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ أَخِيكَ ٱلْحَسَنِ
segments.translation: and on behalf of your brother al-Hasan.

segments.arabic: وَنَصَحْتَ وَجَاهَدْتَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa nasahta wa jahadta fi sabili allahi
segments.translation: And you advised and strove in the way of Allah

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَهُ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.translation: and you served Him sincerely until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: فَجَزَاكَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرَ جَزَاءِ ٱلسَّابِقِينَ
segments.translation: So, may Allah award you with the best of the rewarding of the foremost (to deeds of goodness).

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `alayka wa sallama tasliman
segments.translation: And may Allah bless and exalt you thoroughly.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa salli `ala alhusayni almazlumi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, and send blessings upon al-Husayn the wronged,

segments.arabic: ٱلشَّهِيدِ ٱلرَّشِيدِ
segments.translation: the martyr, the orthodox,

segments.arabic: قَتِيلِ ٱلْعَبَرَاتِ
segments.translation: the slain one whom is wept heavily,

segments.arabic: وَأَسِيرِ ٱلْكُرُبَاتِ
segments.translation: and the object of agonies

segments.arabic: صَلاةً نَامِيَةً زَاكِيَةً مُبَارَكَةً
segments.translation: with such blessings that are increasing, growing, and sacred;

segments.arabic: يَصْعَدُ أَوَّلُهَا وَلاَ يَنْفَدُ آخِرُهَا
segments.transliteration: yas`adu awwaluha wa la yanfadu akhiruha
segments.translation: the first of which ascends and the last of which is infinite,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلادِ أَنْبِيَائِكَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awladi anbiya'ika almursalina
segments.translation: and with the best blessings that You ever sent on any of Your missioned Prophets’ sons.

segments.arabic: يَا إِلٰهَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: O God of the worlds!

duas.title: Continued...
duas.description: You may then kiss the holy tomb and put your right and then your left cheeks on it. You may then circumambulate it and kiss it from the four sides. Shaykh al-Mufid adds: You may then direct towards the tomb of `Ali ibn al-Husayn, stop there, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلصِّدِّيقُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O veracious, pure,

segments.arabic: ٱلزَّكِيُّ ٱلْحَبِيبُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُ
segments.translation: immaculate, dear, favorite,

segments.arabic: وَٱبْنَ رَيْحَانَةِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: and son of the basil of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ شَهِيدٍ مُحْتَسِبٍ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you as you are steadfast martyr.

segments.arabic: وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.translation: Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: مَا أَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأَشْرَفَ مُنْقَلَبَكَ
segments.transliteration: ma akrama maqamaka wa ashrafa munqalabaka
segments.translation: How noble your position is and how honorable your seat is.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ شَكَرَ ٱللَّهُ سَعْيَكَ
segments.translation: I bear witness that Allah thanked you for your efforts,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْزَلَ ثَوَابَكَ
segments.translation: magnified your rewards,

segments.arabic: وَأَلْحَقَكَ بِٱلذَّرْوَةِ ٱلْعَالِيَةِ
segments.translation: and joined you to the exalted summit

segments.arabic: حَيْثُ ٱلشَّرَفُ كُلُّ ٱلشَّرَفِ
segments.translation: where there is the entire honor

segments.arabic: وَفِي ٱلْغُرَفِ ٱلسَّامِيَةِ
segments.translation: in the elevated chambers.

segments.arabic: كَمَا مَنَّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَجَعَلَكَ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلبَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: kama manna `alayka min qablu wa ja`alaka min ahli albayti
segments.translation: Similarly, He had bestowed upon you and made you one of the members of the Household of the Prophet

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ أَذْهَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ وَطَهَّرَهُمْ تَطْهِيراً
segments.transliteration: alladhina adhhaba allahu `anhum alrrijsa wa tahharahum tathiran
segments.translation: from whom Allah removed filth and whom He purified with thorough purification.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ وَرِضْوَانُهُ
segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu wa ridwanuhu
segments.translation: Allah’s blessings, mercy, benedictions, and pleasure be upon you.

segments.arabic: فَٱشْفَعْ أَيُّهَا ٱلسَّيِّدُ ٱلطَّاهِرُ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: fashfa` ayyuha alssayyidu alttahiru ila rabbika
segments.translation: So, O pure master, (please) intercede for me with your Lord

segments.arabic: فِي حَطِّ ٱلأَثْقَالِ عَنْ ظَهْرِي وَتَخْفِيفِهَا عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: fi hatti al-athqali `an zahri wa takhfifiha `anni
segments.translation: so that He may unburden and relieve me from the loads (of sins) that I carry on my back.

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ ذُلِّي وَخُضُوعِي لَكَ وَلِلسَّيِّدِ أَبِيكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمَا
segments.transliteration: warham dhulli wa khudu`i laka wa lilssayyidi abika salla allahu `alaykuma
segments.translation: And (please) have mercy upon my humbleness and submission to you and to the master, your father. May Allah bless you both.

duas.title: Continued....
duas.description: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following words:

segments.arabic: زَادَ ٱللَّهُ فِي شَرَفِكُمْ فِي ٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: zada allahu fi sharafikum fi al-akhirati
segments.translation: May Allah increase your honor in the Hereafter

segments.arabic: كَمَا شَرَّفَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.translation: in the same way as He honored you in this world

segments.arabic: وَأَسْعَدَكُمْ كَمَا أَسْعَدَ بِكُمْ
segments.translation: and may He bless you in the same way as He blessed others on account of you.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ أَعْلاَمُ ٱلدِّينِ
segments.translation: And I bear witness that you are the signposts of the religion

segments.arabic: وَنُجُومُ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: and the stars of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

duas.title: Continued - Martyrs of Karbala
duas.description:
You may then direct towards the martyrs and say the following words:
After Completion of the below: You may then return to the side of the Imam’s head to offer the (two-unit) prayer of ziyarah and pray Almighty Allah for yourself, your parents, and your brethren-in-faith.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you all, O supporters of Allah

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ رَسُولِهِ
segments.translation: supporters of His Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ
segments.translation: supporters of `Ali the son of Abu-Talib

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ فَاطِمَةَ
segments.translation: supporters of Fatimah,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.translation: supporters of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارَ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ
segments.translation: and supporters of Islam.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتُمْ لِلَّهِ
segments.translation: I bear witness that you indeed did sincerely for the sake of Allah

segments.arabic: وَجَاهَدْتُمْ فِي سَبِيلِهِ
segments.translation: and strove sincerely in His way.

segments.arabic: فَجَزَاكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْلاَمِ وَأَهْلِهِ أَفْضَلَ ٱلْجَزَاءِ
segments.transliteration: fajazakum allahu `an al-islami wa ahlihi afdala aljaza'i
segments.translation: So, may Allah reward you on behalf of Islam and its people with the best of rewarding.

segments.arabic: فُزْتُمْ وَٱللَّهِ فَوْزاً عَظِيماً
segments.translation: By Allah I swear, you did win a great success.

segments.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ فَوْزاً عَظِيماً
segments.transliteration: ya laytani kuntu ma`akum fa'afuza fawzan `aziman
segments.translation: I whish I were with you so that I would win a great success.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمْ أَحْيَاءٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْزَقُونَ
segments.translation: I bear witness that you are alive with your Lord, receiving sustenance.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكُمُ ٱلشُّهَدَاءُ وَٱلسُّعَدَاءُ
segments.translation: I bear witness that you are the true martyrs and the true happy ones

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكُمُ ٱلْفَائِزُونَ فِي دَرَجَاتِ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa annakumu alfa'izuna fi darajati al`ula
segments.translation: and you are the winners in the most elevated ranks.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
